title: Insurance Policy Q&A Assistant
summary: Help claims and underwriting teams retrieve policy clauses, exclusions, and evidence-backed guidance from policy manuals and endorsements.
knowledge_base: User: claims reviewers and underwriters who need faster coverage decisions.
Primary pain: searching fragmented policy language and endorsements under time pressure.
Decision output: clause-backed answer with next-step guidance and escalation signals.
Business impact: faster handling times and fewer coverage interpretation errors.

app_modules.label: Claims 01
app_modules.title: Coverage Question
app_modules.description: Ask a policy question for a live claim and retrieve the most relevant policy language.
app_modules.prefill: Does endorsement language allow payout for interior water damage after roof wear and tear?

app_modules.label: Claims 02
app_modules.title: Policy Fit Review
app_modules.description: Compare the current claim profile against baseline coverage and escalation patterns.
app_modules.hint: Coverage and escalation movement appears here.

app_modules.label: Claims 03
app_modules.title: Adjuster Brief
app_modules.description: Generate the next-step brief an adjuster can use before finalizing the claim decision.
